_comment: strict=false is DELIBERATE. In strict mode only mods listed in the *_required/optional
files are allowed, and those files ship empty -- turning strict on now would kick every
player including the admin. We run in deny-list mode until the allow-list is generated.
To upgrade to strict (recommended once the pack is stable):
1. set collectMode=true and put your player UUID in collectWhitelist
2. join once from a clean install of the official pack
3. the mod rewrites both_side_required.json / client_optional.json / server_only.json
4. move any client-only mandatory mods into client_required.json
5. set collectMode=false and strict=true, commit the generated files, ship the update
Deny-list mode blocks known cheat mod ids. A renamed cheat jar can slip past it -- the
whitelist and the Auth mod are what actually keep a friends server safe, and AntiXray is
what stops xray regardless of what the client runs.
customMessage: This server runs the official al Shabab modpack. Cheat mods are not allowed. Reinstall the pack with update.bat or your launcher.
